widgets_values: Cinematic cyberpunk scene. A narrow, dimly lit industrial corridor with rusted metal walls, exposed pipes, and flickering neon tube lights overhead — one cold cyan, one deep red. Shallow depth of field. Shot on 35mm anamorphic lens. Film grain.

{"segments":[{"prompt":"subject1, a Asian man with short black hair and a black beard. His left arm is completely replaced by a cybernetic prosthetic arm, made of metallic plating, carbon fiber textures ending in a robotic mechanical hand. He is wearing a olive, heavy utility jacket over a olive green t-shirt and dark cargo pants.
subject2, a woman with solid black eyes and long white hair. Her eyes with streaks of dark liquid like black tears down her cheeks. On her head, she wears glowing, fractured translucent red crystal bunny ears. She is wearing a black latex bodysuit, a heavy metallic collar choker, a dark leather body harness with chains, torn fishnet stockings, and chunky black combat platform boots.
subject3,neon pistol.

Static shot. Wide shot of the corridor. The subject1 a Asian man and the subject2 a woman with solid black eyes stand facing each other approximately one meter apart in the center of the corridor. The man's body is turned slightly toward the woman, his cybernetic left hand hanging at his side, fingers loosely open. The subject2 a woman with solid black eyes  stands with arms crossed over her chest, posture upright, chin level. Her solid black eyes are open and fixed forward. Her crystalline rabbit ears glow with a steady deep red light. Both figures are frozen, caught between exchanged glances. No motion.","length":63,"color":"#5cb85c"},{"prompt":"Handheld drift. Wide shot holds as the subject1, a Asian man turns his head left then right slowly, scanning the corridor walls. His right shoulder lifts slightly in a shrug. His cybernetic left arm shifts with a faint mechanical joint movement, fingers flexing once. His lips part: he says "What are we even doing here?" — jaw moves, breath visible. subject2, a woman with solid black eyes does not move. Her arms remain crossed. Her solid black eyes stay fixed ahead. Her crystalline red ears pulse once — a single dim flicker.","length":63,"color":"#d9534f"},{"prompt":"Push in slowly to Close-Up on the subject2, a woman's face. White hair drifts gently as if in a faint air current. Her solid black eyes do not blink. Facial muscles completely relaxed — no tension in brow, no movement in jaw. Her lips open minimally and she speaks in a calm, flat tone: "We are testing character consistency." Her expression does not shift. The rusted O-ring collar catches the red light from her ears. The dark red streaks on her cheeks are motionless dried marks.","length":63,"color":"#9b6cd6"},{"prompt":"Cut to Medium shot of the subject1, a Asian man, camera angle slightly low — hero framing. The subject2, a woman with solid black eyes right shoulder visible in soft foreground blur. The man's facial muscles relax — slight upward pull at the corner of his mouth, a slow nod of his head. His lips form a half-smile. He speaks: "Oh, cool. Then I'll do this..." — jaw moving, eyes steady, gaze dropping briefly downward toward his left side.","length":63,"color":"#4f8edc"},{"prompt":"Close-up of a cybernetic left arm and chest area. subject1, a Asian man pulls a subject3,neon pistol from beneath his jacket and racks the slide with his other hand.","length":63,"color":"#a07060"},{"prompt":"Immediate cut to Close-Up of the subject2, a woman's face. Her solid black eyes remain fixed. Then: the corners of her lips pull wide — a full genuine open-mouthed smile, teeth visible. Her arms uncross, both pale hands rise to chest height, and she begins clapping rapidly with short quick movements — palms flat, fingers together. Her crystalline rabbit ears shift from steady red to rapid irregular flashing — alternating bright red pulses at a fast rhythm, like blinking party lights.","length":62,"color":"#e07b3a"}]}

subject1, a Asian man with short black hair and a black beard. His left arm is completely replaced by a cybernetic prosthetic arm, made of metallic plating, carbon fiber textures ending in a robotic mechanical hand. He is wearing a olive, heavy utility jacket over a olive green t-shirt and dark cargo pants.
subject2, a woman with solid black eyes and long white hair. Her eyes with streaks of dark liquid like black tears down her cheeks. On her head, she wears glowing, fractured translucent red crystal bunny ears. She is wearing a black latex bodysuit, a heavy metallic collar choker, a dark leather body harness with chains, torn fishnet stockings, and chunky black combat platform boots.
subject3,neon pistol.

Static shot. Wide shot of the corridor. The subject1 a Asian man and the subject2 a woman with solid black eyes stand facing each other approximately one meter apart in the center of the corridor. The man's body is turned slightly toward the woman, his cybernetic left hand hanging at his side, fingers loosely open. The subject2 a woman with solid black eyes  stands with arms crossed over her chest, posture upright, chin level. Her solid black eyes are open and fixed forward. Her crystalline rabbit ears glow with a steady deep red light. Both figures are frozen, caught between exchanged glances. No motion. | Handheld drift. Wide shot holds as the subject1, a Asian man turns his head left then right slowly, scanning the corridor walls. His right shoulder lifts slightly in a shrug. His cybernetic left arm shifts with a faint mechanical joint movement, fingers flexing once. His lips part: he says "What are we even doing here?" — jaw moves, breath visible. subject2, a woman with solid black eyes does not move. Her arms remain crossed. Her solid black eyes stay fixed ahead. Her crystalline red ears pulse once — a single dim flicker. | Push in slowly to Close-Up on the subject2, a woman's face. White hair drifts gently as if in a faint air current. Her solid black eyes do not blink. Facial muscles completely relaxed — no tension in brow, no movement in jaw. Her lips open minimally and she speaks in a calm, flat tone: "We are testing character consistency." Her expression does not shift. The rusted O-ring collar catches the red light from her ears. The dark red streaks on her cheeks are motionless dried marks. | Cut to Medium shot of the subject1, a Asian man, camera angle slightly low — hero framing. The subject2, a woman with solid black eyes right shoulder visible in soft foreground blur. The man's facial muscles relax — slight upward pull at the corner of his mouth, a slow nod of his head. His lips form a half-smile. He speaks: "Oh, cool. Then I'll do this..." — jaw moving, eyes steady, gaze dropping briefly downward toward his left side. | Close-up of a cybernetic left arm and chest area. subject1, a Asian man pulls a subject3,neon pistol from beneath his jacket and racks the slide with his other hand. | Immediate cut to Close-Up of the subject2, a woman's face. Her solid black eyes remain fixed. Then: the corners of her lips pull wide — a full genuine open-mouthed smile, teeth visible. Her arms uncross, both pale hands rise to chest height, and she begins clapping rapidly with short quick movements — palms flat, fingers together. Her crystalline rabbit ears shift from steady red to rapid irregular flashing — alternating bright red pulses at a fast rhythm, like blinking party lights.

Create a continuous, single-take dynamic action sci-fi video scene starting exactly from the layout in reference 4. The rugged Asian man from reference 2 and the woman from reference 1 are running at high speed toward the camera down a narrow industrial brick alleyway, identical to the composition in reference 4. Directly behind them, the heavy combat drone from reference 3 flies low, its four jet engines firing downwards, kicking up dust and debris. The drone maneuvers violently, its engines smashing into the narrow alley walls and tearing huge chunks of brick from the structure as sparks fly.

The frantic camera tracks backwards smoothly ahead of them, keeping the Asian man on the left and the woman on the right of the frame, as a wall explodes. Without any cuts, as they approach the turn, the Asian man grabs her right hand with his left cybernetic arm and abruptly pulls her around a corner to the left. As they pivot into the turn, the camera seamlessly whips around and orbits to the rear, positioning itself directly behind them. 

The chase continues dynamically inside the long filthy tunnel from a behind-the-back tracking shot, showing their backs as they run away from the camera. Due to the turn and camera shift, the woman in latex is now running on the left side of the frame, and the Asian man is on the right side of the frame. Bright tracer rounds pierce through the grimy walls from left to right as they make a powerful, desperate dash toward a blinding, harsh daylight visible as a tiny, distant light source at the very end of the endless tunnel. They rush straight through the dark exit and spill out onto an open cobblestone square, sliding on the wet stones as they struggle to maintain their balance.

The camera seamlessly pans up into the gray sky above the square as the steel combat drone from reference 3 descends rapidly from the clouds on roaring jet engines, firing at maximum power. A devastating, catastrophic shockwave hits the ground, sending clouds of dust, flying rocks, shards of glass, and torn vegetation flying outward in a whirlwind. The Asian man braces his feet against the powerful wind, his green coat blowing back, while the woman is crouched low, hands on the cobblestones, her long white hair greatly tousled by the air currents.

Preserve the woman's face, pale white skin, long platinum white hair with straight bangs, terrifying completely solid pitch-black eyes with entirely black sclera and no whites, dark liquid blood tears on her cheeks, glowing fractured translucent red crystal bunny ears, black latex bodysuit, metallic collar choker, and body harness from reference 1.

Preserve the rugged Asian man's face, short black hair, thick well-groomed full black beard, serious expression, detailed cybernetic prosthetic left arm made of silver plating and carbon fiber, olive heavy utility jacket, olive green t-shirt, and dark cargo pants from reference 2.

Preserve the heavy steel combat drone's body shape, dark metallic chassis, automatic underbelly turret, four visible glowing jet engines, mechanical plating, and aggressive sci-fi tactical appearance from reference 3.

Start the video sequence with the exact visual composition, character positions, lighting, and environmental layout shown in reference 4.

Dynamic continuous action scene, single-take shot, frantic camera tracking, fast-paced cinematic motion, 35mm film, dark dystopian sci-fi aesthetic, graceful natural movement, high detail, photorealistic cyberpunk style.

groups.title: Promt Relay - does not work for action scenes
